nasb.text: But Saul said, “Not a man shall be put to death this day, for today the Lord has accomplished deliverance in Israel.”

esv.text: But Saul said, “Not a man shall be put to death this day, for today the Lord has worked salvation in Israel.”

cnv.text: 掃羅說：“今天不可以殺人，因為今天是耶和華在以色列中施行拯救的日子。”

ccb.text: 扫罗却说：“今天不可杀人，因为今天耶和华拯救了以色列。”
